entries.text:
Sequence Placeholder:
Beiwang wakes as if from a dream, sits up, and upon locking eyes with the protagonist, transforms into the protagonist's likeness and nods.
[Beiwang] It is time for you to wake up.
Beiwang transforms into a dream butterfly and vanishes as a Kun flies overhead.
[Mysterious Voice] (Zhuang Zhou) I dream of a butterfly, the butterfly dreams of me; as I know myself, all things are me. Proceed to the north.
[Protagonist] Meng Yongzhi's voice? A Kun? Is this... a dreamscape?
Sequence End
entries.zh_text:
seq占位：
北望如梦初醒，从地上坐起来，与主角对视时，化为主角的样子，点点头。
【北望】你该醒来了。
北望化为梦蝶消失，天上鲲飞过。
【神秘声音】（庄周）我梦蝴蝶，蝴蝶梦我，同我知我，万物皆我，往北方前行吧。
【主角】孟永之的声音？鲲？这就是……幻梦奇景么……
seq结束
entries.official_en_text:
seq Placeholder:
Beiwang, like one waking from a dream, sits up from the ground, and upon eyeing the protagonist, transforms into their likeness, and nods.
Beiwang: You should wake up.
Beiwang transforms into a Dream Butterfly and disappears, a Bubble Fish flies overhead.
Mysterious Voice (Zhuang Zhou): I dream of butterflies, butterflies dream of me, knowing me as I know them, all things are me, head north.
Protagonist: Meng Yongji's voice? A Bubble Fish? Is this... the Dream Fantasy Realm...
seq结束

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: When the Scarlet Young Beast is weakened, Yao calls the protagonist to focus fire and steal Red Buff, then uses Smite.
The moment the Scarlet Young Beast falls, Yao strikes a cool pose, thinking he's snatched Red Buff, only to find it went to the protagonist.
[Dongfang Yao] What?
[Cup] (Dongfang Yao tried to steal Gui Die's Red Buff with Smite but cast it too early! It was finally taken by a teammate!)
Just then, the second bottom tower and the first middle tower light up with blue and red pillars respectively.
[Cup] (The situation on the field is changing rapidly! The battles on the other side have also concluded!)
[Protagonist] (The ownership of the first middle tower... has changed. What happened?)
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：在猩红幼兽虚弱之时，曜招呼主角集火抢红，自己释放惩戒。
在猩红幼兽倒下的一刻，曜摆出抢到红的帅气Pose，结果却发现红到了主角身上。
【东方曜】什么？
【杯子】（东方曜想用惩戒抢圭蝶的红，结果放早了！最后被队友收下！）
就在此时，下二塔、中一塔，接连亮起蓝色和红色的光柱。
【杯子】（场上局势瞬息万变！两支队伍在另一边的较量也尘埃落定了！）
【主角】（中一塔的归属……变了。发生什么事了？）

entries.text:
Noble and elegant birds with slender figures.
Long, blue-purple, ice-white feathers on their eyelashes, like distant mountains shrouded in mist, making them seem unattainable.

Unlike the Cloud Hidden, the Distant Mountain Dai dislikes approaching humans.
When they encounter visitors, they fly away after a fleeting glance, as if expressing their displeasure at the disturbance to their tranquility.
They are often used as a metaphor for focused individuals.
entries.zh_text:
高贵优雅的鸟类，身姿纤长。
睫毛上蓝紫色的冰洁长羽，如远山含黛，让人感觉高不可攀。

与云不见不同的是，远山黛不喜亲近人类。
遇见前来探访的人也是匆匆一瞥便飞走，像是诉说对扰鹤清净的不满。
它们也时常被当做专注之人的代称。

entries.text:
"Dark wings cry low, disaster looms; shadows sweep past, gold and silver bloom."

Black feathers drift down, and calamity follows. This is the first impression people have of Litian: ominous, dangerous... Pair after pair of uneasy eyes size him up, yet Litian never cares.
For Litian, only two things matter: first, stylish moves, and second, shiny gold rings. Everything else is trivial and not worth mentioning.

The days of the past are buried beneath the shifting sands. Now, Litian works as a treasure hunter, with the mission of acquiring more gold rings.
Wherever there is gold or treasure, Litian will find his way there. And for the right price, his martial arts and the hook-swords in his hands can be yours to command.
entries.zh_text:
“玄翅低啼祸未央，暗影偏掠金银光。”

墨色羽毛飘落，厄难随之而来。人们看见戾天的第一印象大抵都是如此，不详，危险……一双双满怀不安的眼神打量着他，戾天却从不在意。
对戾天而言，唯有两件重要事物，其一，是帅气的招式，其二，便是亮闪闪的环金。其余皆为俗物，无需称道。

曾经的时光已然被掩埋于黄沙之下，如今的戾天以寻宝为职，以搞到更多环金为使命。
无论何处，有环金，有宝贝，戾天便可寻味而至。
而只需加钱，这一身武艺，手中钩剑，亦可为你所用。

entries.text:
The Snow Velvet Fox is gem-blue all over.
Only its face and chest fur are pure white like snow, elegant and noble like a spirit from the world of ice and snow.
They are extremely sensitive, and ordinary people will quickly flee if they get close, making them hard to approach.

According to hunters, Snow Velvet Foxes seem to be able to sense the end of blizzards.
In storms, they blend almost perfectly with the snowscape, leaving behind only two sets of delicate footprints.
These footprints have saved countless lives lost in blizzards.
entries.zh_text:
雪绒狐通身都是宝石般的蓝色。
唯有面部和胸口绒毛纯白如雪，仿佛是冰雪世界的精灵般优雅高贵。
它们灵敏异常，寻常人一旦靠近便会迅速逃离，为人所难以靠近。

据游猎家记载，雪绒狐似乎可以感应暴雪的结束。
在风暴中它们几乎与雪景融为一体，唯独留下两行细密的脚印。
这两行脚印救助过无数迷失在暴风雪中的生灵。

entries.text:
A cautious and timid deer species, mostly living in mountainous areas.
Compared to other deer species, the horns of the Pillow Wind Deer are more fragile.
It is believed by hunters that they are often threatened by Burn Velvet. Their large antlers are useless against Burn Velvet and only hinder their escape speed.
If a predator grabs a Pillow Wind Deer by its horns, they will not hesitate to break them off to escape.

The horns of deer are seen as a symbol of dignity and strength.
However, compared to life, these are insignificant.
entries.zh_text:
谨慎胆小的鹿种，多生活于山区。
相比较其他鹿种，雄性枕风鹿的角则更加脆弱。
游猎家认为它们常受灼绒威胁，硕大的鹿角对灼绒毫无作用，反倒会影响逃跑的速度。
捕食者一旦抓住枕风鹿的角，它们会毫不犹豫地断角逃生。

鹿的角被视作尊严与力量的象征。
不过比起生命，这些都不值一提。

entries.text:
The Bone Leaf Fox in the dream glows with a deep blue light all over its body.
It has willow-leaf-shaped silver patterns on its back, and its eyes are a peculiar indigo.
Under the influence of dreams, these creatures become more mysterious and agile, making it difficult to get a clear view of their full forms.

Few who have seen the Bone Leaf Fox say they possess a pair of spiritual eyes.
Because of this, in storytellers' tales, the Bone Leaf Fox often appears in poignant and romantic stories.
entries.zh_text:
梦境中的骨叶狐，全身泛着深蓝色的幽光。
背上长着柳叶状的银色纹路，眼睛呈奇特的靛蓝色。
在梦境的影响下这种生物变得更加神秘且机敏，轻易极难看清它们的全貌。

为数不多见过骨叶狐的人说，它们拥有着一双灵性的双眼。
也因此，在说书人的那些段子中，骨叶狐往往出现在哀婉多情的故事里。

entries.text:
Deer widely distributed across Jixia, known for their light and elegant posture.
Female Dust Deer are smaller, with snow-white necks and thick white fur on their chests.
They live in mixed-gender groups with a clear division of labor.

The fur on their backs is light brown, allowing them to blend into their environment, hence the name "Dust Deer."
They are often found in lush, scenic areas with abundant vegetation.
In legends, they are often seen as omens of harvest and good fortune.
entries.zh_text:
广泛分布在稷下各处的鹿，体态轻盈优雅。
雌性尘鹿体格较小，脖颈雪白，胸口处长有茂盛的白色绒毛。
雌雄一同生活，分工明确。

它们背部的绒毛呈浅棕色，善于在环境中隐藏自己，也由此得名尘鹿。
山清水秀、植被丰茂之处常有尘鹿出没。
因此它在传说中往往预示着丰收和幸运。

entries.text:
A rabbit with fur as translucent as jade.
In the dark, people often mistake it for a large gemstone, so when it moves, it always startles the scholars who have fallen asleep.
The Enchanted Dream Rabbit often appears in dreams. They are friendly and are rumored to often help humans, but they occasionally play tricks on greedy individuals.

Legend has it that some people have seen them gather together, their light illuminating the entire sky.
However, to this day, this remains just a legend.
entries.zh_text:
毛色如同玉石般剔透的兔子。
黑暗中人们总会把它错认成大块的宝石，因此当它动起来，总会惊吓到入梦的学子。
旖梦兔时常出现在梦境之中，它们性格友善，传言中时常帮助人类，但偶尔也会捉弄一下贪心的家伙。

传闻中，曾有人见过它们聚集在一起，散发出的光芒照亮了整片天幕。
不过时至今日，这依旧只是传说。

entries.text:
The fur on the nape of the Golden-striped Fox's neck displays flower-like patterns.
These patterns are mysterious and elegant, considered a symbol of nobility, which is why the Golden-striped Fox is highly regarded by many noble families.

According to records, 'The cry of the Golden Fox is a thousand turns of perfection,' and their calls are melodious.
They only cry out nine times in their lives, for reasons unknown, but each cry is different.
Countless musicians have dedicated their lives to capturing their voices.
entries.zh_text:
鎏纹狐后颈的绒毛，显示出花朵般的纹路。
这花纹神秘高雅，被视作是华贵的象征，鎏纹狐也因此被许多世家所推崇。

据记载“鎏狐一声千转绝”，鎏纹狐叫声婉转动听。
它们一生只长鸣九次，原因不明，但次次不同。
为了捕捉它们的声音，无数宫羽家付出了毕生的时光。

entries.text:
Nightmare Deer are distributed throughout the dream realm.
Due to the influence of dream energy, their fur has turned a dark, mystical purple, adorned with many light-colored spots.
Male Nightmare Deer have antlers and a mane covering their chests.
Their dreamlike, deep colors have made them mysterious and eerie beings in folklore.

Their fur color deepens with age.
Legend has it that the Nightmare Deer with the deepest color possesses special powers.
Many who are trapped in nightmares have stated that it was guided by this deer that they were able to wake up.
entries.zh_text:
魇斑鹿分布在整个梦境区域之中。
由于梦能的影响，它们的皮毛变成了幽暗迷幻得紫色，同时点缀着许多浅色斑点。
雄性魇斑鹿长角，前胸覆盖着鬃毛。
梦境般幽深的颜色让它们在民间传说中成为神秘诡谲的存在。

它们的毛色会随着年龄增长越变越深。
传言颜色最深的那一只魇斑鹿，拥有着特殊的力量。
许多困于噩梦的人，都曾表示自己正是受到它的指引才得以从噩梦中醒来。

entries.text:
Nightmare Deer are distributed throughout the dream realm.
Due to the influence of dream energy, their fur has turned a dark, mystical purple, adorned with many light-colored spots.
Female Nightmare Deer have white necks and no antlers, but a patch of pink fur on their heads.

Ancient divination studies at Jixia believe that Nightmare Deer feed on human dreams; males consume deep dreams, and females consume shallow dreams.
If you encounter both a male and female deer in a dream, it may mean that your dream will not come true.
entries.zh_text:
魇斑鹿分布在整个梦境区域之中。
由于梦能的影响，它们的皮毛变成了幽暗迷幻得紫色，同时点缀着许多浅色斑点。
雌鹿的脖颈雪白，头顶上没有角，取而代之的，是一抹粉色绒毛。

稷下的古老占卜学中认为，魇斑鹿以人类的梦为食，雄鹿吞食深层梦境，雌鹿吞食浅层梦境。
如果在梦中同时遇到雌雄两头鹿，可能意味着梦想将要落空。

entries.text:
A ruler-wielding Old Master doll, meticulously carved from cloud root, with a smooth and lustrous surface.
       
This work is inspired by Master Fu Zi's image of guiding students in the training grounds. Every time the Gu She Mountain trials are held, Old Master Fu Zi spars alone with the martial arts students. The ruler lightly touches the students like a swimming dragon, guiding their martial arts moves.
       
When this item was first put on the market at Bai Hui Fang, sales were dismal. Later, a martial arts student, in a moment of inspiration during an exam, brought this doll with him. Subjects he had repeatedly failed were passed smoothly. Thus, the legend spread throughout the academy that the doll could bring good luck in exams, and sales boomed for a time.
entries.zh_text:
手持戒尺的老夫子玩偶，由云根精雕细琢而成，表面光滑润泽。
       
此作品灵感来源于夫子老师在试炼场指点学生的形象。每逢姑射山试炼，老夫子独自一人与众武道学生切磋。戒尺如游龙般在学生身上轻触，指点他们武道招式。
       
此物刚在百汇坊上架时，销量十分惨淡。后来有位武道学生在考试时，突发奇想将此玩偶带在身上，屡次不及格的科目竟顺利通关。于是，学院流传起了该玩偶能为考试带来好运，一时间销售火爆。

entries.text: A small boat drifts along the river, weaving between pavilions and waterside structures. Xi Shi sits on the boat, the red silk ribbon tied to her wrist fluttering in the wind.
entries.zh_text: 一叶小舟顺着河流在楼阁水榭间穿行，西施坐于小舟，腕上系着的红色丝巾在风中飘荡。

entries.text:
A gentle breeze sends the birds home, and the babbling brook is veiled in silver.
The Great River Spirit waits behind the stone tablet, yearning for a chase.
The Little River Spirit sings joyfully, its melody lively and melodious.
Under the <69D0FF>Silver Moon</>, the River Spirits dance together, bestowing blessings upon those who meet.
entries.zh_text:
清风送鸟儿回家，潺潺流水披上了银纱。
大河灵在石碑后等待，渴求一场追逐赛。
小河灵雀跃吟唱，动人的旋律灵动悠扬。
<69D0FF>银月之下</>河灵共舞，为相遇者送上祝福。

entries.text: Where the night sky meets the sea, Xi Shi smiles at the small green dragon coiled around her forearm.
entries.zh_text: 夜空与海面所交融之地，西施微笑着看向缠绕在小臂上的小青龙。

entries.text:
Mechanism Challenge Announcement
Recently, some students have reported that the mechanism cannot be activated normally, but this is due to using the wrong solution.
Students, please observe carefully and think more during the challenge.

Hint: The mechanism requires <69D0FF>Fire</> to operate normally.

Please do not use brute force to destroy the mechanism or ruin structures.
Unused incendiary canisters should not be discarded carelessly or taken away!
entries.zh_text:
机关挑战公告
近日，有同学反映机关无法正常启动，实则是采用了错误的解法。
请同学们在挑战过程中，仔细观察，多多思考。

提示：机关需要<69D0FF>火焰</>才能正常运行。

请勿用蛮力破坏机关及遗迹建筑。
未使用的燃烧罐，请勿乱扔乱放更不要带走！

entries.text:
Camera pans up to the commentators' booth.
[Shi Ren] The final moment is finally here!
Scene: Dongfang Yao faces five opponents alone, fighting to break through.
[Kuai Zui] Just now, Dongfang Yao single-handedly fought against the five members of the Gui Die team, buying his teammates the initiative.
Scene: The protagonist obtains the last mark, Xi Shi applauds nearby.
[Kuai Zui] The Star team has collected three marks first and is now advancing towards the crystal.
Scene: The Gui Die team rushes desperately, arriving at the crystal first.
[Kuai Zui] However, the Gui Die team is not willing to give up the chance for a final struggle and waits for them at the crystal.
[Shi Ren] The name of the champion is about to be revealed! Let's return to the arena and cheer for the players you support!
Cut back to the arena. The five members of the Star team are at the front of the high ground in the mid lane, advancing towards the crystal.
entries.zh_text:
镜头拉高，衔接至解说席。
【石任】决战时刻终于要来了！
画面：东方曜一个人迎战五人，奋力突围。
【蒯最】刚才，东方曜以一人之力，迎战圭蝶队五人，为队友赢得先机。
画面：主角拿到最后一枚印记，西施在旁鼓掌。
【蒯最】星之队率先集齐了三枚印记，此刻正要向水晶进发。
画面：圭蝶队拼命赶路，提前抵达水晶。
【蒯最】不过，圭蝶队也不愿放弃最后一搏的机会，在水晶等待着他们。
【石任】冠军的名字，即将揭晓！让我们回到赛场，为你们支持的选手，加油助威吧！
切镜回赛场，星之队五人在中路高地前，开始向水晶进发。

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: The moment the Scarlet Young Beast falls, Yao strikes a cool pose, thinking he's snatched Red Buff, only to find it went to the protagonist.
[Dongfang Yao] What?
[Cup] (Dongfang Yao tried to steal Gui Die's Red Buff with Smite but cast it too early! It was finally taken by a teammate!)
Just then, the second bottom tower and the first middle tower light up with blue and red pillars respectively.
[Cup] (The situation on the field is changing rapidly! The battles on the other side have also concluded!)
[Protagonist] (The ownership of the first middle tower... has changed. What happened?)
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：在猩红幼兽倒下的一刻，曜摆出抢到红的帅气Pose，结果却发现红到了主角身上。
【东方曜】什么？
【杯子】（东方曜想用惩戒抢圭蝶的红，结果放早了！最后被队友收下！）
就在此时，下二塔、中一塔，接连亮起蓝色和红色的光柱。
【杯子】（场上局势瞬息万变！两支队伍在另一边的较量也尘埃落定了！）
【主角】（中一塔的归属……变了。发生什么事了？）

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: Three members of the Gui Die team appear in response. As Gui Die lands, Li Yuanfeng and Chi Mang, still in mid-air, are flung to the first level by Meng Ya and Sun Bin.
The three on the second level are at daggers drawn. Gui Die and Xi Shi face off again, each with their own thoughts.
The protagonist must turn the tide with the dual buffs, and a small team fight is about to begin.
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：圭蝶队3人应声登场，圭蝶刚落地，还在跳跃中的李元峰和赤莽就被蒙犽孙膑抓飞到1层
2层的3人剑拔弩张，圭蝶与西施二次对垒，各有所想
而主角则要利用双Buff力挽狂澜，小团战即将开始

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the entire audience gasps.
[Shi Ren] As expected of a clash between strong teams, the situation on the field is changing rapidly!
Scene: Meng Ya and Sun Bin are knocked to the ground. Qing Lan triumphantly snatches the mechanical mark and holds it high.
[Kuai Zui] The Gui Die team quickly changed their strategy, ambushing the Star team in the river and successfully snatching the mechanical mark!
Scene: At the second top tower, the protagonist holds the mark, hears the audience gasp, and looks stunned. Xi Shi covers her mouth in shock, and Dongfang Yao, mid-victory pose, also stops.
[Kuai Zui] The other teammates of the Star team seem to haven't reacted yet. Fortunately, they also obtained the demonic mark.
Scene: Six towers, with the middle-first and top-second now glowing blue, and top-first and bottom-second glowing red.
[Kuai Zui] The Gui Die team catches up by one point, and the situation on the field is now tied!
Scene: The commentators are impassioned, and the audience is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Who will win the final showdown? The excitement continues!
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众发出惊呼声。
【石任】不愧是强队的交锋，现场局势真是瞬息万变！
画面：蒙犽和孙膑被击倒在地，青岚耀武扬威地夺走了机关印记，正高高举着。
【蒯最】圭蝶队迅速改变策略，在河道伏击星之队，成功抢下机关印记！
画面：上二塔，主角拿着印记，听见观众惊呼，表情懵了。西施震惊捂嘴，东方曜胜利挥拳到一半也停下了。
【蒯最】星之队的其他队友好像还没反应过来。好在，他们也拿到了魔道印记。
画面：六座塔，现在中一、上二亮起蓝光，上一、下一亮起红光。
【蒯最】圭蝶队追上一分，场上局势来到了平手！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】最后的角逐，究竟鹿死谁手？精彩继续！

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the entire audience gasps.
[Shi Ren] As expected of a clash between strong teams, the situation on the field is changing rapidly!
Scene: Fei Han and Qing Lan are disheveled and hung in the air by Fu Yun Kan. Sun Bin is panting, the protagonist watches with arms crossed, and Meng Ya waves at them.
[Kuai Zui] The Gui Die team tried to ambush the Star team in the river, but the Star team's support arrived quickly, foiling their plan.
Scene: At the second top tower, Dongfang Yao is knocked to the ground by the Dragon Tooth Hammer. Gui Die raises a hand to shoot a cold arrow, but Li Yuanfen is hit by Dongfang Yao's sword.
[Kuai Zui] However, the Star team's plan at the second top tower also met resistance, and both teams suffered heavy losses.
[Kuai Zui] The number of marks for both sides remains unchanged, with the Star team still leading!
Scene: The commentators are impassioned, and the audience is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] There isn't much time left for the Gui Die team. Will the situation change again? Let's cut back to the arena!
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众发出惊呼声。
【石任】不愧是强队的交锋，现场局势真是瞬息万变！
画面：妃寒和青岚灰头土脸被浮云瞰吊在半空，孙膑气喘吁吁，主角抱臂看着，蒙犽还朝他们挥手。
【蒯最】圭蝶队试图在河道伏击星之队，但星之队的支援来得很快，没让他们得逞。
画面：上二塔，东方曜被龙牙锤倒在地，圭蝶抬手放出冷箭，李元芬却被东方曜的剑砍中。
【蒯最】不过，星之队在上二塔的计划也遭到了阻力，两支队伍打得两败俱伤。
【蒯最】双方的印记数量没有变化，星之队依旧领先！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】留给圭蝶队的机会不多了。局势还会发生变化吗？让我们把镜头切回赛场！

entries.text:
Custom combat placeholder:
Xi Shi controls the opponents, Sun Bin casts his ultimate to pin down Guidie and the others, Meng Ya activates his Berserk and bombards the targets. The Protagonist and Dongfang Yao take the opportunity to destroy the defense tower core.
entries.zh_text:
定制战斗占位：
西施控制住对面，孙膑释放大招，定住圭蝶等人，蒙犽开启狂暴，狂轰目标。主角和东方曜趁机将防御塔核心打爆

entries.text:
Performance placeholder:
1. The lifting platform is destroyed by the Gui Die team and stops in mid-air.
2. Everyone uses their abilities to reach higher ground using surrounding buildings + the platform in the air.
entries.zh_text:
表演占位：
1.升降平台被圭蝶队破坏，停在空中。
2.大家各自使用自己的能力和周围建筑+空中平台上至高地。

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the entire audience cheers.
[Shi Ren] Audience friends, all three lanes have reached a conclusion!
Scene: Xi Shi and the protagonist simultaneously reach out to touch the mark. Xi Shi smiles, as if it was effortless.
[Kuai Zui] The Star team won a brilliant victory on the demonic path, and this mark was easily obtained.
Scene: Li Yuanfen is disheveled and hung in the air by Fu Yun Kan, being taken back to the spring.
[Kuai Zui] Looking at the mechanical lane, Li Yuanfen fought two opponents alone, a commendable effort! However, he ultimately lost with regret.
Scene: Dongfang Yao is beaten badly, his face pressed against the screen. Behind him, Long Ya and Qing Lan stand with arms crossed and cold stares, contemptuously playing with the mark in their hands.
[Kuai Zui] While his teammates enjoy their victory, Dongfang Yao carries the burden. Fortunately, his efforts have paid off well.
Scene: Middle-first and bottom-second lanes light up with blue pillars. Top-first lane lights up with a red pillar.
[Kuai Zui] The result of the first round of clashes - the Star team takes the lead for now!
Scene: The commentators are impassioned, and the audience is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Will the Star team maintain their advantage all the way? Can the Gui Die team make a comeback? We'll have to wait and see!
Cut back to the arena.
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众欢呼。
【石任】观众朋友们，三路交锋都有了结果！
画面：西施和主角一同伸手触碰印记，西施微笑，仿佛不费吹灰之力。
【蒯最】星之队在魔道路打了一场漂亮的胜仗，这枚印记被轻松收入囊中。
画面：李元芬灰头土脸地被浮云瞰吊着，带回泉水。
【蒯最】再看机关路，李元芬一个打两个，勇气可嘉！不过最终，还是遗憾败北。
画面：东方曜被胖揍，脸都贴在屏幕上，他身后，龙牙和青岚一个抱臂一个冷眼，不屑地把印记抛在手中把玩。
【蒯最】在队友们享受喜悦之时，东方曜也在负重前行。好在他的付出有了不错的回报。
画面：中一和下一升起蓝色光柱。上一升起红色光柱。
【蒯最】第一轮碰撞的结果——星之队，暂时领先！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】星之队会一路优势到底吗？圭蝶队又能否后来居上？我们拭目以待！
切回赛场。

entries.text: Transition placeholder: Xi Shi uses Flash to dodge Gui Die's dangerous attack. The protagonist then delivers the final blow to Gui Die, defeating them. Seeing they couldn't get the mark, Gui Die's three members fled.

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: Both sides confront each other. Gui Die conjures a bow, the arrow aimed directly at Dongfang Yao. Dongfang Yao's sword is already unsheathed, and the protagonist grips their weapon, ready for battle.
Just then, the barrier of the dome is broken by a red divine power. Everyone looks up in alarm.
Jiang Ziya and Xing Li descend from the sky, breaking through the barrier and landing. Dust rises, and everyone covers their mouths and noses, coughing.
Before the dust settles, Jiang Ziya's majestic voice rings out.
[Jiang Ziya] Where is the divine staff?
[Xing Li] It doesn't seem to be here. Did he lie to us?
Dongfang Yao frowns deeply, gripping the Star Sword vigilantly.
[Dongfang Yao] You again...
Jiang Ziya's contemptuous gaze sweeps past Dongfang Yao and directly at Fu Yun Kan, addressing the Master.
[Jiang Ziya] Hand over the divine staff, and I will leave.
The Master in Tongtian Tower's pupils contract.
Meanwhile, outside the arena, Jiang Ziya's threat appears on the broadcast screen, causing an uproar. Xing Mang's expression immediately tenses, becoming serious.
[Xing Mang] Lingyun Guard, follow me!
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：
双方对峙，圭蝶幻化出弓，箭簇直指东方曜，东方曜手中的剑也已出鞘，主角握紧武器，随时准备战斗。
就在这时，穹顶的结界被红色封神之力冲破，众人惊慌抬头。
姜子牙和星离从空中而来，冲破结界之后落地，烟尘四起，所有人都捂住口鼻开始咳嗽。
烟尘尚未散去，姜子牙威严的声音就已传来。
【姜子牙】神杖，在何处？
【星离】看起来不在这里。难道，他骗了我们？
东方曜狠狠皱眉，警惕地握紧星辰之剑。
【东方曜】又是你们……
姜子牙轻蔑的眼神略过东方曜，直接看向浮云瞰，向夫子喊话。
【姜子牙】交出神杖，我自会离去。
远在通天塔的夫子瞳孔一震。
与此同时，赛场外，转播大屏幕上出现姜子牙的威胁，现场一片哗然，星芒顿时紧绷起来，神色严肃。
【星芒】凌云卫，跟我来！

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the entire audience gasps.
[Shi Ren] As expected of a clash between strong teams, the situation on the field is changing rapidly!
Scene: Meng Ya and Sun Bin are knocked to the ground. Qing Lan triumphantly snatches the mechanical mark and holds it high.
[Kuai Zui] The Gui Die team quickly changed their strategy, ambushing the Star team in the river and successfully snatching the mechanical mark!
Scene: At the second middle tower, the protagonist holds the mark, hears the audience gasp, and looks stunned. Xi Shi covers her mouth in shock, and Dongfang Yao, mid-victory pose, also stops.
[Kuai Zui] The other teammates of the Star team seem to haven't reacted yet. Fortunately, they also obtained the demonic mark.
Scene: Six towers, with the top-first and middle-second now glowing blue, and the middle-first and bottom-second glowing red.
[Kuai Zui] The Gui Die team catches up by one point, and the situation on the field is now tied!
Scene: The commentators are impassioned, and the audience is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Who will win the final showdown? The excitement continues!
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众发出惊呼声。
【石任】不愧是强队的交锋，现场局势真是瞬息万变！
画面：蒙犽和孙膑被击倒在地，青岚耀武扬威地夺走了机关印记，正高高举着。
【蒯最】圭蝶队迅速改变策略，在河道伏击星之队，成功抢下机关印记！
画面：中二塔，主角拿着印记，听见观众惊呼，表情懵了。西施震惊捂嘴，东方曜胜利挥拳到一半也停下了。
【蒯最】星之队的其他队友好像还没反应过来。好在，他们也拿到了魔道印记。
画面：六座塔，现在上一、中二亮起蓝光，中一、下一亮起红光。
【蒯最】圭蝶队追上一分，场上局势来到了平手！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】最后的角逐，究竟鹿死谁手？精彩继续！

entries.text:
Switch to the spectator area, where the broadcast is presented in a comic-book style.
In the spectator area, the crowd cheers.
[Shi Ren] Friends, the battles in all three lanes have reached a conclusion!
Screen: Xi Shi and the protagonist reach out to touch the mark together; Xi Shi smiles, as if it took no effort at all.
[Kuai Zui] Team Star fought a beautiful battle in the Magic Lane, and the mark was easily claimed.
Screen: Li Yuanfen is dragged back to the fountain, looking disheveled, by the Floating Cloud Scout.
[Kuai Zui] Look at the Mechanism Lane. Li Yuanfen took on two at once—courageous! But in the end, a regrettable defeat.
Screen: Dongfang Yao is getting beaten up, his face pressed against the screen. Behind him, Long Ya and Qing Lan stand with arms crossed, coldly tossing the mark between them in disdain.
[Kuai Zui] While his teammates enjoy the joy of victory, Dongfang Yao is carrying the burden. Fortunately, his efforts have paid off.
Three-panel screen: The blue light pillars representing Team Star rise in the mid and bottom lanes. A red light pillar lights up in the top lane.
[Kuai Zui] The result of the first round of clashes—Team Star takes the lead!
Screen: The commentators are passionate, and the crowd becomes even more boisterous.
[Shi Ren] Will Team Star maintain their advantage all the way? Or can Team Gui Die make a comeback? Let's wait and see!
Cut back to the arena.
entries.zh_text:
切换到观赛区，以漫画形式进行解说播报。
观赛区内，全场观众欢呼。
【石任】观众朋友们，三路交锋都有了结果！
画面：西施和主角一同伸手触碰印记，西施微笑，仿佛不费吹灰之力。
【蒯最】星之队在魔道路打了一场漂亮的胜仗，这枚印记被轻松收入囊中。
画面：李元芬灰头土脸地被浮云瞰吊着，带回泉水。
【蒯最】再看机关路，李元芬一个打两个，勇气可嘉！不过最终，还是遗憾败北。
画面：东方曜被胖揍，脸都贴在屏幕上，他身后，龙牙和青岚一个抱臂一个冷眼，不屑地把印记抛在手中把玩。
【蒯最】在队友们享受喜悦之时，东方曜也在负重前行。好在他的付出有了不错的回报。
三格画面：中一塔和下一塔，代表星之队的蓝色光柱升腾而起。上一塔亮起红色的光柱。
【蒯最】第一轮碰撞的结果——星之队，暂时领先！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】星之队会一路优势到底吗？圭蝶队又能否后来居上？我们拭目以待！
切回赛场。

entries.text: Long Ya and Gui Die are sent back to the spring, and the Star team's minion wave is also cleared.
entries.zh_text: 龙牙和圭蝶被送回泉水，同时星之队的兵线也被清理干净了

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: The Star team and Gui Die team take their positions at the starting point and crystal respectively.
In the spectator area, the audience erupts in cheers upon seeing the broadcast, taking turns shouting support for their teams. The camera pans to the commentators.
[Xing Mang] Now, charge!
Inside the arena, the defense towers activate one by one: the first, second, and finally the Glory Crystal. Minions spawn.
The Star team charges forward amidst the cheers, with Meng Ya quickly setting up tactics along the way.
[Meng Ya] Sun Bin, Xi Shi, come with me to the first tower. Dongfang Yao, you two go get the Azure Spirit Beast first!
 The other four nod and quickly split into two groups. The camera follows the protagonist and Dongfang Yao as they run towards the Azure Spirit Beast point.
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：
星之队和圭蝶队分别在起点和水晶就位。
观赛区，观众看到转播，彻底沸腾，轮流呼喊着支持队伍的名字。镜头给到解说。
【星芒】现在，全军出击！
赛场内，防御塔一座座启动，一塔，二塔，最后是荣耀水晶。兵线刷新。
星之队在呼喊声中向前跑，途中蒙犽快速布置战术。
【蒙犽】孙膑西施，跟我去一塔。东方曜，你们两个先去拿湛蓝灵兽！
其他四人点头，迅速兵分两路。镜头跟随主角和东方曜，到跑向湛蓝灵兽点的途中。

entries.text:
Transition placeholder: As the barrier covering the arena dissipates, the match officially begins.
In the distance, the defense towers in the arena activate one by one, entering defense mode. The Gui Die squad rushes out instantly.

远处，赛场里的防御塔依次激活，进入防御状态，圭蝶小队刷的一下就全冲出去了。

entries.text: You must mean Senior Gui Die. Her ranking on the Merit Board is very high.
entries.zh_text: 你说的应该是圭蝶学姐，她在伯仲榜上的排名可高了。

entries.text: It seems both Xi Shi and Gui Die are fated to cross your path.
entries.zh_text: 似乎西施和圭蝶都和你很有缘。

entries.text: Exactly! Why not consider joining Senior Guidie's team? You'd definitely be a core member.
entries.zh_text: 就是就是，要不要考虑加入圭蝶学姐的队伍，你一来肯定是核心成员。

entries.text: Please pay more attention to our Gui Die senior from the Demonic Arts Academy!
entries.zh_text: 请大家多多关注我们魔道学院的圭蝶学姐！

entries.text: Guidie... I think I've seen her name on the Merit Board. She's ranked pretty high.
entries.zh_text: 圭蝶……我好像在伯仲榜上看到过她的名字，排名还挺靠前的。

entries.text: You don't know? Senior Gui Die is the most promising student in the Magic Academy this year.
entries.zh_text: 你也还不知道呀，圭蝶学姐可是今年魔道学院里最有潜力的人。

entries.text: We all think Senior Guidie will definitely win this time.
entries.zh_text: 我们都觉得圭蝶学姐这次一定会获胜。

entries.text: Haha, Senior Guidie really made a splash on the Merit Board, even overshadowing Senior Yao.
entries.zh_text: 哈哈，圭蝶学姐可是在伯仲榜上一鸣惊人，风头都盖过了曜学长呢。

entries.text: Yes, please support Senior Gui Die a lot!
entries.zh_text: 是呀，请多多支持圭蝶学姐哦！

entries.text: Oh my! Is there no law in Jixia? No morals? No rules?

entries.text: Thanks for your help, classmate. I barely made it out alive.
entries.zh_text: 感谢同学相助，我算是捡回了这条命。

entries.text: Fine, I'll see you at the Feiyu Terrace.
Fine, I'll see you at the Feiyu Terrace.
Thanks for your concern, but this place is too dangerous to stay. Let's get out of here first.
entries.zh_text: 多谢关心，这里险象环生，不宜久留，不如我们先离开这里。

entries.text: When we get to <001>Feiyu Terrace</>, I'll slowly tell you the whole story, okay?
entries.zh_text: 等到了<001>非语台</>，我再慢慢告诉你事情的前因后果可好？

entries.text: What a unique Flux. You might be able to break those purple <001>"Star Fiends"</>.
entries.zh_text: 好特别的流，若是你说不定可击破那些紫色<001>“妖星”</>。
entries.official_en_text: What a unique Flux. You might be able to break those purple <001>妖星</>.

entries.text: Careful, get out of the fire!
Quick, find someone to put out the fire!
This fire came so suddenly, it's unbearable!
entries.zh_text: 这火来得好突然，令人难受！

entries.text: What's going on? Why is there a fire?
Why did a fire start suddenly?
If only my cannon had this much power.
entries.zh_text: 要是我的火炮威力也能这么大就好了。

entries.text: I heard that massive explosions can also extinguish fires.
entries.zh_text: 我听说，剧烈的爆炸也能灭火。

entries.text: Should I invent a fire-extinguishing construct...
entries.zh_text: 我是不是得研发个灭火机关……

entries.text: Get out of here, humans aren't as heat-resistant as constructs.
entries.zh_text: 快离开这儿，人可没有机关抗热。

entries.text: A good opportunity to observe the flames.
entries.zh_text: 倒是个观测火焰的好机会。

entries.text: Did someone cast a fire-related magic?
entries.zh_text: 是谁放了和火有关的魔道术吗？

entries.text: I remember there's a magic technique specifically for putting out fires?
entries.zh_text: 我记得有招专门灭火的魔道术？

entries.text: The energy in this fire doesn't seem to be from demonic arts.
entries.zh_text: 这火中的能量不像魔道术产生的。

entries.text: In the last match, I pushed the enemy's defense tower.
entries.zh_text: 上次比赛，我推了对面的防御塔。

entries.text: I participated in the tactical operation to destroy the crystal last month!
entries.zh_text: 我上个月参与了拆水晶的战术行动！

entries.text: The longer the match goes on, the less we're taken seriously.
entries.zh_text: 比赛时间越长，我们就越不受重视。

entries.text: Yeah, I could put up a fight at first, but later on, one move and I'm down.
entries.zh_text: 没错，一开始还能拉扯两下，后期一招我就躺下了。

entries.text: It's unfair. I wish there was gear we could wear too.
entries.zh_text: 不公平，要是有我们也能穿的装备就好了。

entries.text: Exactly. We should suggest that the Academy optimize the match mechanics.
entries.zh_text: 太对了，得跟学院建议，优化一下比赛机制。

entries.text: When the enemy pushed to high ground that day, where were you?
entries.zh_text: 那天对面打上高地的时候，你去哪儿了？

entries.text: I didn't see you when our crystal was destroyed the day before yesterday.
entries.zh_text: 前天我们水晶被人推掉的时候我也没看见你。

entries.text: In war, the most important thing is to keep the soldiers fed.
entries.zh_text: 战争中最重要的，是让士兵吃饱肚子。

entries.text: Hunger is the soldier's greatest enemy.
The aroma is pleasant, but I can't eat it.
entries.zh_text: 香气扑鼻，可惜我不能进食。

entries.text: Don't give up, we can still turn this around.
My bad, that was a mistake.
Let's go, team! One final push!
Don't fight, wait for the team.
Wait for me to gather for a team fight.
Wait for me, I'm almost there!
